blocks.text: MacIntyre leads by four with a round to play. Reitan at T8 needs a Sunday charge — a top-10 at TPC San Antonio would be the perfect Masters tune-up.
♟️ Carlsen wins three from three — the world champion is in frightening form
Barcelona head to the Metropolitano — La Liga title on the line

blocks.label: More this weekend
items: 🎾 Sat — Monte-Carlo Masters opens; Ruud's favourite clay-court hunting ground
🚴 Sun 10:00 — Tour of Flanders; seven Norwegians tackle the Monument
🏎️ Sun 07:00 — Japanese GP at Suzuka; Antonelli leads, Russell 9 points back
